role: Senior Retail IT Engineer → DTC Technical Manager → Senior Ecommerce Manager
description: Progressive six-year career spanning three promotions. Started as Senior Retail IT Engineer supporting hardware, software, and network infrastructure across 25+ US retail stores while driving digital innovations and data-driven solutions. Moved into DTC Technical Manager, translating stakeholder needs into development requirements and running A/B tests using page depth, heatmaps, and content analysis. Ultimately led the Americas eCommerce operation as Senior Ecommerce Manager, overseeing analytics, site operations, and the digital roadmap while managing a team of three direct reports. Led end-to-end site optimization activities including A/B testing and personalization, and worked cross-functionally with Operations, Digital Marketing, and Finance to prioritize enhancements and drive sell-through.
